Mary and Lester throw an extravagant bash for her parents' 50th wedding anniversary, only to find that the guests of honor aren't speaking to each other. Veteran performers Beah Richards and Whitman Mayo guest star as Mary's feuding parents.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las víctimas con grandes seguidores en las redes sociales son encontradas muertas en Maryland, la UAC busca un sospechoso asumiendo la personalidad de una leyenda urbana de Internet.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un destacado abogado desaparece en Boston, la UAC descubre secretos en su pasado que podrían señalar las razones de su desaparición.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga crímenes aleatorios en el norte de Virginia y busca a un sospechoso del conflicto, que tiene un deseo incontrolable de matar, él también está lleno de remordimiento.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se llama al UAC a Salt Lake City, Utah, para investigar un triple asesinato, la búsqueda de una conexión entre las víctimas podría llevarlos hasta un fugitivo que podría estar relacionado con el sospechoso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras investigan la muerte de un suboficial en un accidente de coche, el equipo de NCIS descubre su oscuro secreto: una vida oculta dedicada a las peleas callejeras.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Durante la semana de Navidad, el equipo de NCIS está trabajando horas extras buscando a un principal sospechoso que se pensaba muerto desde hace 17 años.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS tiene que desentrañar la verdad sobre el asesinato de un guardia de prisión, que provocó un motín y dejó a McGee en manos de los reclusos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Se revelan secretos del pasado de Ducky cuando aparece apuñalado en la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Todo depende del cristal
programme.desc: Frank se enfrenta a una periodista que se niega a revelar su fuente, aunque admite haber cometido un asesinato. Danny se empareja con un adolescente problemático en un programa de la policía para ayudarlo a tomar mejores decisiones.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Revancha
programme.desc: Un sospechoso admite haber matado a un chef de un programa de reality show en su restaurante. Danny y Maria creen que está asumiendo la culpa por alguien. Frank enfrenta un dilema moral con su amigo, el senador Ted McCreary.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Nuevas reglas
programme.desc: Cuando alguien cercano a Frank es asesinado, Frank ordena que todos se involucren para atrapar al asesino. Danny y Maria visitan a Mario Hunt, un conocido miembro de una pandilla peligrosa, para trabajar en el caso.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El arte de la guerra
programme.desc: Cuando un miembro de la familia Reagan es tiroteado, Danny intenta rastrear al miembro de la pandilla responsable sin dejar que sus emociones lo dominen. También debe ser creativo para atraer a testigos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las víctimas con grandes seguidores en las redes sociales son encontradas muertas en Maryland, la UAC busca un sospechoso asumiendo la personalidad de una leyenda urbana de Internet.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un destacado abogado desaparece en Boston, la UAC descubre secretos en su pasado que podrían señalar las razones de su desaparición.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers review dashcam footage after a suspect claims force was used against him unjustly, and a weed enthusiast drops some knowledge on police about the founding fathers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disgruntled man is tased, leaving his unhoused wife to fend for herself. A sovereign citizen is arrested for a stolen firearm. A man in possession of meth claims a bag belongs to his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies confront a man holding a knife to his roommate’s neck over a prior argument. A suspect runs from deputies on a warrant charge. Suspected robbers are pulled over by deputies.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect attempts to discard drugs during a foot chase. A man fails to pull over for minor infraction and then bails out his car on foot. A man is arrested after being spotted in a drug transaction.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies chase a wanted man who makes a break for it, a man leads officers on a vehicle pursuit, and a routine traffic stop ends with an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist tries to bolt when questioned by police, a deputy uses a cotton swab to procure evidence from a suspect's mouth, and an unmowed lawn triggers a domestic disturbance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police go off-roading to follow a stolen car, a man has odd excuses for having suspicious items, and an officer settles a dispute between a wife and her jealous husband.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man leads Officers on a pursuit across county lines. An Officer assists in an undercover sting to capture drug dealers. An Officer finds a gun in a suspects car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect fresh out of jail is found with narcotics. A motorcycle named 'Love Machine' is saved from a hot wire. A man bursts his tire in a bad place and officers come to the rescue.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are concerned when a fleeing man leaves a trail of illicit items. A young woman unwisely decides to hang out with a man she nicknamed 'Sketchy.' Some well-placed security cameras help reunite a man with his stolen bike.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After chasing down a suspect on foot, officers retrieve a fully loaded revolver from his pants, and police respond to a call about a man wielding a knife outside a bar.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver speeds off when asked to step out of his truck. Deputies learn a man with a warrant for fentanyl is hiding in a backyard. A suspect steals a portable speaker after threatening an employee.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is questioned for assaulting a woman on a train. A man is arrested for burglarizing a casino, he initially denies the charges but surveillance footage corroborates. A father kicks his son out of the house after his drinking becomes problematic.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A couple assaults a tow lot employee who won't release their car, a suspicious man catches a patrol's attention, and police detain a carload of suspected shoplifters.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted suspect tries to hide from officers, a woman calls deputies to apprehend her hostile husband, and a passenger tries to outrun the police during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver takes his unsuspecting passenger on a wild ride as he tries to evade police, a man's date is cut short by a traffic stop, and police are called to evict a roommate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers use a police SUV and a taser to stop a fleeing man with a knife. A hit-and-run suspect crashes into a gas station. An unlicensed driver has warrants in Greene County, Missouri.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Suspects in a white van throw a bike at police during a wild pursuit. A man runs from Deputies on a mini-bike. A mermaid commits traffic infractions and is caught with pills.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer spots a suspect returning to an area to pick up a hidden stash of narcotics. An officer learns that occupants of a suspicious vehicle has outstanding warrants. A domestic battery is investigated and justice is served.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers wrestle with a familiar nuisance to shop owners, a man's lucky dollar lets him down during a traffic stop, and too much whiskey leads to a domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy tries to cut a guy some slack after his relationship troubles got out of hand. A teenager gets a serious lesson in not drinking while underage. A couple is forced to take a raincheck on their wedding day.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen Dodge Ram 1500 crashes and knocks the power out. A woman caught huffing canned air in a stolen car keeps changing her story. A FLIR-equipped helicopter is used to catch fleeing juveniles.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A convenience store sprinter bets officers he'll get away next time, matching bullets help solve an armed robbery, and a trucker takes his family on a supersized car chase.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers capture a suspected burglar, a felon, and his girlfriend are taken into custody after a standoff with police, and a man is arrested for possession of a stolen moped.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When officers approach, a suspect flees into a fast-food restaurant. A driver takes his granny's wheels for a dangerous spin with cops in pursuit. Sheriffs catch up to a man who fled the scene of a possible domestic battery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A prostitution sting in Las Vegas nets more than just johns, police respond to reports of a woman licking the sidewalk, and a patrol happens on a lovers' row in a parking lot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two suspects wreck their vehicle while attempting to evade police in a hot pursuit. Officers respond to a domestic dispute involving neighbors. A suspect abandons his truck and shoes while running from Officers.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: CSI determines a young mother's suicide was actually foul play.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A routine traffic stop turns into a wild police chase through the streets of a Las Vegas Latino ghetto.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Evidence points to Sofia as the shooter who accidentally shot another officer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving night, a man is found dead in a dumpster behind a restaurant.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A widowed mother's six-year-old son is reported kidnapped from a local park.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: CSI investigates the murder of a man who was covered in hair from head to toe and shot in the heart with a silver bullet.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team is brought into the world of tweakers and methamphetamines.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs enter the world of glamorous old Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: CSI investigates two deaths, both linked to the same killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom teams up with Lady Heather.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A body is discovered stuffed into a working chimney of a residential home.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A crime documentary series follows the CSIs for the first 48 hours of an investigation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A high profile murder trial is thrown into a tailspin when two siblings confess to the same crime.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Science collides with the occult when the team investigates the case of a psychic who predicted her own murder.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El equipo CSI está en alerta zombi cuando dos hombres inicialmente declarados muertos misteriosamente vuelven a la vida.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Mientras investiga el asesinato de un ex policía convicto, el equipo de CSI se topa con una lista en su celda de la prisión con los nombres de varias personas que creía que podrían haber sido el verdadero asesino de su esposa.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Una serie de muertes instigan una apuesta entre el equipo de CSI en cuanto a si han "golpeado para el ciclo," un homicidio, un suicidio, un accidente y una muerte natural en una sola noche.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Langston y Sara se dirigen a Lady Heather en busca de ayuda para localizar al culpable responsable de herir a una mujer antes de que aparentemente fuera mutilada hasta la muerte por un león de montaña.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Después de su fuga, Nate Haskell, el famoso asesino de "Dick & Jane", reaparece cuando envía por correo electrónico un inquietante video de amenaza de muerte al padre de una de sus novias.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Langston se vuelve más decidido que nunca a localizar a Nate Haskell, el famoso asesino de "Dick & Jane," después de descubrir que ha secuestrado a su ex esposa, Gloria.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Después de años de persecución y un sinnúmero de asesinatos, Langston se encuentra cara a cara con el asesino en serie, Nate Haskell, dentro de la casa donde comenzó su juerga de asesinatos.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Múltiples tiroteos y apuñalamientos en un tranvía público dejan al equipo de CSI con un testigo y muchas preguntas.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Tres sospechosos se presentan con tres razones diferentes por las que mataron a toda una familia y el equipo de CSI tiene que determinar quién dice la verdad.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Durante una cita,Stokes se da cuenta de que una obra de arte en una exhibición tiene partes del cuerpo en descomposición,lo que lleva a una investigación en toda regla.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El exalcalde de Las Vegas recibe un disparo en el Museo de la Mafia y el equipo de CSI se embarca en una lección de historia en busca de pistas.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Cuando un helicóptero de evacuación médica secuestrado con el CSI Brody a bordo desaparece, todo el equipo está en la caza.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra una desconocida cerca de las extrañas atracciones de un espectáculo itinerante inspirado en el siglo XIX, el equipo investiga un elenco de personajes inusuales.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI llega a un accidente automovilístico, encuentran tres víctimas y un cerebro humano que no pertenece a ninguna de las víctimas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a fire hydrant washes away all the evidence at a crime scene, the CSIs must recreate a very bizarre double murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the CSIs investigate a murder at a roller derby match, the only thing shorter than the girls' skirts are their tempers.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami is ablaze with crime and chaos when Memmo Fiero, Horatio Caine's wife's killer, returns to take control of the city.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine and the CSI team try to figure out which of the nerds took revenge when a high school bully is stoned to death.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a woman narrowly escapes death at the hands of a serial killer, Horatio will do anything to track down the psychopath.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine and the CSI team uncover an exclusive hunting club where the prey is human, the most dangerous game of all.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a delivery truck driver and a housewife on his route are murdered, Horatio Caine and the CSI team try to find their connection.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An escaped prisoner takes Natalia hostage and tells her a shocking secret about his crimes. Horatio Caine and the rest of CSI the team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine has decided to protect a mixed martial arts fighter from his dangerous brother who recently escaped from prison.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the CSIs find a co-ed dead in a hot tub, they investigate a case marked by jealousy, psychosis and college roommates.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio Caine chases down a mysterious murder suspect, he discovers that the man's entire life is an elaborate charade.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After Horatio captures the last prison escapee, their transport plane crash lands, and they discover the fugitive has more planned than a getaway.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and Natalia’s lives hang in the balance as Horatio stands between Natalia and certain death.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs are led into the sexy world of male gigolos when they uncover an unusual murder weapon.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Todd Burton está tratando de salir de la furia del huracán cuando mata a un hombre en medio de una tormenta que le impide ver y ahora lo acusan de homicidio vehicular involuntario.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un gasista se ve envuelto en llamas invisibles y muere. Todo esto sucede durante una carrera clasificatoria del Gran Premio de las Américas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio finalmente cierra el caso del asesinato de su hermano. Se reencuentra con Suzie, una ex-drogadicta que estuvo involucrada con su hermano.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Después de que ven a una mujer siendo atacada por un tiburón, el equipo de CSI descubre que fue asesinada antes de ser arrojada al agua.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Una joven es arrojada por la barandilla de un estacionamiento, la investigación sobre su muerte revela pruebas de que la asesinaron antes de la caída.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Después de que encuentran muerto a un anestesiólogo de cirugía plástica por un aparente suicidio, Horatio cree que podría ser un caso de asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un corredor de diamantes es asesinado a tiros en un estacionamiento, un hombre con discapacidad mental presenció el asesinato y quiere ayudar a Horatio a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un hombre, Juan Marco Varón, que puede haber torturado o no a refugiados cubanos, llaman al equipo de CSI para investigar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio y su equipo se adentran en el mundo de las celebridades e investigan el asesinato de un paparazzi. Él descubre que la víctima fue testigo de otro asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Ted Henderson muere en su propia casa y su cuerpo está desaparecido, mientras que dejan a su esposa y su hijo con vida, pero golpeados y atados.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: En los Everglades, cerca de un incendio controlado, Alexx y Delko registran la escena del crimen. Se ven obligados a protegerse cuando un muro de fuego los alcanza.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio llega rápidamente al lugar cuando asaltan a un camión blindado que transporta 3.2 millones de dólares en un atrevido atraco en el centro de la ciudad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Wally Shmagin se convierte literalmente en parte de la escena de un crimen después de robar un guante de látex para agregarlo a su colección forense personal.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un periodista escurridizo es el único testigo de un asesinato y Horatio sospecha que puede estar buscando una historia mucho más importante.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team works to solve two seemingly unrelated murders that after investigations are underway turn out to be connected.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates crimes: one involving a model that was killed on a billboard in Times Square, and another centered around a robbery.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of a groom on his wedding day and the appearance of a mysterious box on the hood of Stella’s car.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac travels to Chicago in order to solve the mystery of the 333 caller while the rest of the CSI team works on a murder in a subway car.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a wealthy man in a hip nightclub and the inadvertent shooting of a young boy during a robbery.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of the owner of a posh hotel as well as the death of a teenager that seems to be connected to Peter Pan.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After a young woman and a prominent judge are murdered, the CSI team works to discover the connection between the two crimes.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a street luger and the mysterious drowning of a woman in a self-sanitizing pay bathroom.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a trained female assassin comes to New York City, she really puts the CSI New York team members’ abilities to the test.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The kidnapping of a little girl and a fire set to her apartment building leaves CSI New York team member Stella feeling guilty and homeless.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A shark washes up on shore unloading a dead body and a bizarre crime scene that leaves the CSI New York team more than puzzled.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A high school dance is interrupted by the killing of the school’s guidance counselor. Meanwhile, the taxi cab serial killer is still on the loose.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A professional basketball game ends early after a fan is chosen for the million dollar half court shot where he makes it and inexpediently dies.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The taxi cab killer whom the CSI New York team has been trying to catch strikes again, only this time it’s at the expense of a New Jersey cop.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Descansa en paz, Marina Garito (S6 Ep18)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a una mujer, la evidencia y la autopsia sugieren suicidio, pero Stella no está convencida y arriesga su vida para continuar con el caso.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Redención (S6 Ep19)
programme.desc: El último pedido de un condenado a muerte lleva a Hawkes a una cárcel de Pensilvania y se enfrenta a un secreto personal justo cuando estalla un motín en la prisión.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Sospechosos inesperados (S6 Ep20)
programme.desc: El asesinato a tiros de un chico de 14 años frente a su hermano de 12 años lleva el deseo de justicia del detective Mac Taylor a otro nivel.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Desde el subsuelo (S6 Ep21)
programme.desc: Cuando una losa de concreto comienza a chorrear sangre en el centro de la ciudad, la investigación del equipo de CSI los lleva a un mundo clandestino de peleas brutales.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Punto de vista (S6 Ep22)
programme.desc: Después de ser herido, Mac observa a sus vecinos mientras se recupera y es testigo de una actividad misteriosa que conduce a asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Escapada en vacaciones (S6 Ep23)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York sigue un rastro que dejó Shane Casey y se da cuenta de que por venganza, él tiene en la mira a Danny, que está de vacaciones.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Piso 34 (S7 Ep1)
programme.desc: El miembro más nuevo del equipo de CSI de Nueva York, como bienvenida, se topa con una mujer asesinada en el edificio del laboratorio de criminalística de la policía de Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Plática poco amigable (S7 Ep2)

programme.title: Fuera de control
programme.desc: La sociedad moderna traza líneas entre el bien y el mal, la furia y la redención. Un momento de ensimismamiento y una chispa de ira harán que dos hombres las atraviesen. La lucha se intensifica, y las vidas de ambos cambian para siempre.

programme.title: La estafa maestra
programme.desc: Tras ser traicionados y abandonados a su suerte en Italia, Charlie Croker y su equipo planean un elaborado robo de oro contra su antiguo aliado.

programme.title: Fuimos héroes
programme.desc: En 1965, Estados Unidos está en guerra con Vietnam del Norte, y el teniente coronel Hal Moore prepara a sus tropas para una de las batallas más violentas de la historia de EE. UU.: “El valle de la muerte”.

programme.title: Fuera de control
programme.desc: La sociedad moderna traza líneas entre el bien y el mal, la furia y la redención. Un momento de ensimismamiento y una chispa de ira harán que dos hombres las atraviesen. La lucha se intensifica, y las vidas de ambos cambian para siempre.

programme.title: Inmersión letal
programme.desc: Paul Walker y Jessica Alba esperan pasar unos momentos inolvidables buceando, pero se meten en un lío con un traficante cuando encuentran la carga ilícita de un avión hundido en este thriller submarino lleno de acción y sorpresas.

programme.title: Atrapen al gringo
programme.desc: Un criminal de carrera, capturado por las autoridades mexicanas, es enviado a una prisión de alta seguridad donde aprende a sobrevivir con la ayuda de un niño

programme.title: Top Gun: "Pasión y gloria"
programme.desc: Tom Cruise es el magnífico Maverick Mitchell, un joven piloto que está dispuesto a ser el mejor. Y Kelly McGillis interpreta al instructor que le enseña a Maverick algunas cosas que no se aprenden en clase.

programme.title: Jack Ryan: código sombra
programme.desc: El suspenso no se detiene mientras el recluta de la CIA Ryan queda atrapado en una peligrosa red de intriga y espionaje. Ryan debe pasar de soldado a analista a agente operativo para detener un complot terrorista devastador contra EE. UU.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: El origen de Cobra
programme.desc: Son los G.I. Joe, una fuerza de intervención de élite de alto secreto formada por los mejores agentes de todo el mundo. Después de que la malvada Cobra haya robado un arma secreta, los G.I. Joe deben impedir que Cobra sumerja al mundo en el caos.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: el contraataque
programme.desc: "Los héroes americanos más grandes" están de regreso y han sido culpados de un crimen atroz que no cometieron. Roadblock (Dwayne Johnson) dirige a un nuevo equipo en esta explosiva aventura.

programme.title: 13 horas: los soldados secretos de Bengasi
programme.desc: Del director Michael Bay, 13 horas es la historia de un grupo élite de seis exmilitares asignados para proteger a la CIA, que lucharon cuando los terroristas atacaron un complejo diplomático estadounidense el 11 de septiembre de 2012.

programme.title: La invención de Hugo Cabret
programme.desc: Situada en París en 1930, un huérfano que vive entre los muros de una estación de trenes, se encuentra envuelto en un misterioso suceso que involucra a su padre y a un autómata.

programme.title: Rugrats la película: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Con el nacimiento de su nuevo hermano Dylan, Tommy Pickles sabía que las cosas iban a cambiar, pero nunca esperó que ser un hermano pudiera ser tal aventura.

programme.title: Sherlock Gnomes (ESP)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a una aventura fe-gnome-nal en el mundo secreto de los gnomos de jardín! Cuando Gnomeo y Julieta descubren que sus amigos han desaparecido, junto al detective SHERLOCK GNOMES, resuelven el misterio y traen a los gnomos a casa.

programme.title: Bob Esponja: un héroe fuera del agua
programme.desc: Con la misión de salvar su mundo, ¡Bob Esponja se dirige al nuestro por primera vez en la vida! Cuando el pirata Barba Burger roba la receta de las Cangreburger, Bob Esponja y sus amigos se transformarán en superhéroes para vencer al supervillano.

programme.title: Bob Esponja, la película
programme.desc: Él es la loca estrella submarina de un océano lleno de aventuras, él es Bob Esponja en su debut en la película original!

programme.title: Sonic: La película
programme.desc: El mundo necesitaba un héroe, y nos llegó un erizo. Dotado de una velocidad sobrehumana, Sonic corre para salvar el mundo y evitar que el malvado genio Dr. Robotnik domine el mundo.

programme.title: Dora y la ciudad perdida
programme.desc: Cuando sus padres desaparecen en busca de la Ciudad Perdida del Oro, Dora se lanza a una trepidante aventura para encontrarlos. Acompaña a Dora y a sus amigos mientras se adentran en la selva, se adelantan a los cazatesoros y desvelan el misterio.

programme.title: Un detective suelto en Hollywood
programme.desc: Las papas queman en esta comedia-acción de ritmo veloz, con la actuación estelar de Eddie Murphy como Axel Foley, un listo policía de las calles de Detroit, que rastrea al asesino de su mejor amigo en Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Un detective suelto en Hollywood II
programme.desc: Axel Foley regresa a Beverly Hills para ayudar a Taggart y Rosewood a investigar el tiroteo casi mortal del jefe Bogomil y la serie de "crímenes del alfabeto" asociados a él. Protagonizada por Eddie Murphy.

programme.title: Un detective suelto en Hollywood III
programme.desc: Axel Foley (Eddie Murphy), que investiga una red de robo de coches, se encuentra con algo mucho más grande que eso: los mismos hombres que mataron a su jefe llevan una red de blanqueo de dinero en un parque temático de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Cantinflas

programme.title: Complices (LAS)
programme.desc: Un seductor experto lleva a su sobrino en un viaje a la playa en busca de mujeres calientes. Pero la única mujer capaz de causarle problemas, aparece allí.

programme.title: El crimen del padre Amaro

programme.title: Cómo cortar a tu patán
programme.desc: Amanda, una terapeuta especializada en ayudar a las mujeres a terminar las relaciones destructivas, vive lejos de los hombres y del compromiso. Dedicada al trabajo y la protección de su hermana Natalia.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Casese Quien Pueda
programme.desc: The best-laid love plans go hilariously awry in this romantic-comedy hit about two sisters (Martha and Miriam Higareda) who find themselves in uncharted romantic territory.

programme.title: Pídeme lo que quieras
programme.desc: Tras la muerte de su padre, Eric Zimmerman viaja a España para supervisar las sucursales de su empresa. En Madrid, se enamora de Judith y entabla una relación erótica llena de exploración. Eric teme que su secreto acabe con su aventura.

programme.title: Día de la madre
programme.desc: Rebecca DeMornay brinda una interpretación aterradora en este baño de sangre brutal. Cuando sus hijos entran a una casa y toman como rehenes a los dueños; ella les enseña cómo es la verdadera tortura. Coprotagonizada por Shawn Ashmore.

programme.title: Los usurpadores de cuerpos
programme.desc: Bajo el amparo de las tinieblas, una ciudad duerme sin sospechar que una forma de vida alienígena está formándose para desatar un terror indescriptible, en uno de los grandes thrillers de suspenso clásicos del cine.

programme.title: Cementerio maldito
programme.desc: Basada en la aterradora novela de Stephen King. Después de que la familia Creed se muda a la zona rural de Maine, se topan con un antiguo cementerio con poderes siniestros.

programme.title: Terror al anochecer
programme.desc: En 1946, el pueblo de Texarkana sufrió una serie de experiencias traumáticas que todavía recuerda hoy, treinta años más tarde, entre marzo y mayo, cinco personas fueron asesinadas a manos de un loco enmascarado.

programme.title: El lobo de snow hollow
programme.desc: El sheriff de un pueblo pequeño y su apático equipo de oficiales deben resolver una serie de asesinatos que ocurren en la luna llena. Mientras es consumido por la búsqueda del asesino, lucha por recordarse a sí mismo que los hombres lobo no existen...

programme.title: Cementerio maldito
programme.desc: Basada en la aterradora novela de Stephen King. Después de que la familia Creed se muda a la zona rural de Maine, se topan con un antiguo cementerio con poderes siniestros.

programme.title: Shooting High
programme.desc: A Hollywood company arrives to film the story of Gene Autryís grandfather, the town hero, and hires Gene to work on the film. When the star suddenly abandons the film, Gene steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Invitation to a Gunfighter
programme.desc: Screen legend Yul Brynner turns in a magnificent performance as a gunfighter who must do battle with his most formidable adversary - his own conscience - in this gripping, double-barreled western full of surprise twists and colorful villainy.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: After robbing a Mexican bank, Dad Longworth takes the loot and leaves his partner Rio to be captured but Rio escapes and searches for Dad in California.

programme.title: From Noon Till Three
programme.desc: Charles Bronson plays Graham Dorsey, a bank robber who, through a series of twists and turns finds himself the object of national adoration. A beautiful widow, Amanda Starbuck (Jill Ireland) is responsible for creating this myth.

programme.title: Breakheart Pass
programme.desc: As a train races through the Rocky Mountains, the passengers are being murdered! The only hope is John Deakin (Charles Bronson) who uncovers a secret that explodes in a torrent of shocking revelations, explosive brawls, and blazing gun battles.

programme.title: The White Buffalo
programme.desc: Charles Bronson and Will Sampson star as Wild Bill Hickok and Chief Crazy Horse in this one-of-a-kind western that finds both western legends braving the snowy wilderness in search of the demon that haunts them both, the fabled White Buffalo!

programme.title: Chato's Land
programme.desc: Chato, a half-Apache horseman, is on the run from a blood-thirsty posse led by an ex-Confederate officer, who is determined to see him dead. Eventually, the pursued and the pursuers will become reversed, thanks to the unforgiving, cruel desert.

programme.title: Wings
programme.desc: Two World War I pilots (Charles Buddy Rogers, Richard Arlen) woo a young woman (Clara Bow) and fight the Germans.

programme.title: After The Fox
programme.desc: Pretending to be a movie director, an Italian crook known as The Fox (Peter Sellers) cons local villagers and the police into smuggling into Rome the loot from a $3 million Cairo bullion robbery...as part of the film script!

programme.title: The Life And Death Of Colonel Blimp
programme.desc: From the Boer War through World War II, a soldier rises through the ranks in the British military.

programme.title: Black Narcissus
programme.desc: A group of nuns struggle to establish a convent in the Himalayas, while isolation, extreme weather, altitude, and culture clashes all conspire to drive the well-intentioned missionaries mad.

programme.title: The Red Shoes
programme.desc: A young ballet dancer is torn between the man she loves and her pursuit to become a prima ballerina.

programme.title: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: Producer-director Otto Preminger’s epic treatment of the bombing of Pearl Harbor details the devastating attack on the Hawaiian naval base as well as the explosive, behind-the-scenes stories.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix decides to become a writer and Oscar thinks he's wasting his time and money.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: When Oscar's ulcer begins acting up, Felix decides an ocean voyage will do them both good.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Oscar tries to cover up his divorce from his visiting mother by moving Felix out and ex-wife Blanche.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob's dentist pal, Jerry, strains the friendship when he starts knocking Rob's television show in public.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Buddy ignores Rob's efforts to collect an old debt.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: When his show announces a talent contest, Rob finds himself besieged by the parents of neighborhood prodigies.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Ritchie's expanding vocabulary starts to branch out in unexpected directions.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: While his wife is away, Buddy moves in with the Petries and quickly wears out his welcome.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob's paternal pride suffers a cruel shock when he finds out that his six-year-old son is embarrassed to admit how his Dad makes a living.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Sally drags the entire gang to a bowling alley when she discovers a new dance sensation that's sure to sweep the nation.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Laura believes Rob, on jury duty, has been unfairly swayed by the beautiful blonde defendant.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Romance enters Sally's life in the form of an insurance salesman named Leo Fassbinder.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob's bashful brother arrives in town and proves to be confident and outgoing only when he is sleepwalking.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Lazy Uncle Joe, who fancies himself a human dynamo, announces his retirement.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: The Hooterville folks are faced with a larcenous fund-raiser when they try to find enough money to buy the church a new organ.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: The future of the Shady Rest hangs on the outcome of a race between the Cannonball and an overland taxi.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Steve Elliott hurriedly takes off on a crop-dusting job, not knowing he underbid for the assignment by $1800.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: The dog suddenly becomes a second-class citizen at the Shady Rest hotel when Steve and Betty Jo and Betty Jo move in.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe, caught with too many fish in his possessions by Game Warden Orrin Pike, is threatened with a jail sentence.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Betty Jo finds herself growing jealous of the attention Steve is giving to their daughter, so the pair go on a second honeymoon together, at their old cottage.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Two rough motorcyclists,suspected of poaching, are too many and too tough for Game Warren Orrin Pike to capture.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Sparks fly when the three Bradley sisters and Dr. Craig find themself competitors in a beauty contest.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: An unknown singer tries to smuggle an adorable Vietnamese orphan into the United States by bringing her to Hooterville.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Sgt. Carter is chosen to appear in a documentary but becomes an absurd camera hog, leaving producers no choice but to follow Gomer performing punishments Carter doles out.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: After a pay phone spits out $41.75 in coins, Duke and Frankie are ecstatic about all the fun they can have spending it, but good Samaritan Gomer is determined to return it to the phone company.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer wins a trip for two to Las Vegas and takes Sergeant Carter with him. The Sergeant has no money so he has to rely on Gomer for entertainment but Gomer has set an itinerary which include things like visiting a Rock Museum.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Opie Taylor runs away from Mayberry to join the Marines.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: An operation run by the syndicate is burgled by a small-time crook.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Lieutenant Stone and Inspector Keller go after two insurance agents involved in the counterfeiting of an 1850 6¢ purple Guyana stamp with a value of $300,000.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Police Lt. Larry Gifford follows a tip leading him to a warehouse, where he surprises a man apparently committing a burglary.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Joe Mannix is called to the office of an air freight company and asked to investigate some cargo thefts, unaware that this is a ruse to allow the operators of the company to substitute a double in his place.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Joe Mannix is participating in an auto race when he suddenly begins to experience hallucinations. The resulting crash lands him in a private hospital, where the delusions and paranoia continue.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Joe Mannix is visited one night by Ken Gordon, a young police officer whose life Mannix once saved. Unfortunately, moments later Gordon takes a bullet meant for Mannix, fired by Victor Roarke, a criminal whom Mannix once helped capture.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: James Conway, a former priest is targeted for murder because someone confessed a crime to him when he was still a priest, and believes Conway is going to tell.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Someone is waging a bloody vendetta against a band of innocuous birdwatchers. Although Steve McGarrett feels certain that slaughter will continue, he can't comprehend the "who" and "why" of the killer.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Paul Burke guest stars as attorney David Lawrence, a political candidate whose promising bid for the U.S. Senate is endangered by the murder of a man who tried to blackmail him.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: In a desperate move to locate three world-famous scientists who have vanished, Steve McGarrett sets himself up to be kidnapped by assuming the identity of a fourth eminent scientist.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Steve McGarrett is assigned by the governor of Hawaii to break up a confidence racket that is bilking rich visiting widows of their fortunes. Determined to fight fire with fire, Danny Williams signs on for a cruise, using a fellow policewoman as bait.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A native's love of his unspoiled homeland, a mysterious woman with a camera, a man with a briefcase, and a millionaire industrialist are pieces of the strange puzzle confronting McGarrett in his probe into the death of an official.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A Kidnap hoax and publicity stunt by a young rock 'n' roll singer who decides his career needs a publicity boost backfires when his father offers a huge reward for his return.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Bubba finds himself in trouble when he is in involved in an accidental shooting while on the job. The only witness is Virgil's Aunt Ruda, whose grudge against Virgil may work against exonerating Bubba. Can anyone convince her to do what is right?

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Three months after the execution of Lewis Sweeney, explosions are still rocking the LA area every four days. The unpopular Dr. Sloan continues his efforts to nail Carter Sweeney for the bombings.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run patient mysteriously dies in the hospital, Dr. Sloan and his interns, Jack and Amanda, put their amateur crime solving abilities to the test.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A mobster's gun moll fakes her way past hospital security guards, and Dr. Sloan almost becomes her next victim! Attractive and smart, no one suspected Amy Westin's true identity.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: There's a reunion of former Texas Rangers and there's a shooting competition with cops from all over the country coming to take part in. An old friend of Alex's, a Senator who is rumored to be running for President is also in town.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: There's a reunion of former Texas Rangers and there's a shooting competition with cops from all over the country coming to take part in. An old friend of Alex's, a Senator who is rumored to be running for President is also in town.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker and Trivette attempt to take down an illegal adoption agency.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker and Trivette stop in a small town while transporting a likable prisoner. The sheriff rules the town with strict laws, harsh enforcement, and promotes racism with his deputies.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Rustlers are stealing cattle and selling them. A cattle inspector tracks the group down, but is killed when he tries to arrest them. Walker and Trivette pick up the investigation of the rustlers and find the one who killed the inspector.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and old buddy Jack Dalton are arrested and thrown into a labor camp, only to discover they are being used by the local authorities to search for some hidden bank robbery loot.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and Nikki are trapped by old nemesis Murdoc and are forced to flee down the side of a sheer rock formation where an old friend of MacGyver's lost her life.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver comes to the aid of college student David Ryman, distraught over losing a Physics contest sponsored by David's father, a professor at MacGyver's alma mater.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Nikki unknowingly becomes the target of an international terrorist group, planning to detonate bombs across the city in exchange for the release of their recently imprisoned leader.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Tonight, of all nights, Murphy's Law is definitely operating at its worst! After finally finagling all the details to put together a money-raising telethon for the hospital, Dr. Sloan loses his cool when the host of the show is murdered - on the air!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A late night call for help sends Dr. Sloan racing to the rescue! Ninety-two-year-old millionaire Jonathan Nash fears for his life.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: Thanksgiving Day
programme.desc: When Kathy writes a prize-winning Thanksgiving poem, Jim envisions his Kitten as the next Emily Brontë.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: Second Honeymoon
programme.desc: Jim and Margaret could use some time away from the house, so they plan a weekend getaway.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: Typical Father
programme.desc: Betty is falling hard for a new guy, and it upsets her father.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: Margaret Goes Dancing
programme.desc: Margaret is sure she could never get Jim to agree to take dancing classes with her.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Mr. French encounters an old friend while at the park with the twins. Lorna, the nanny for a Duke and Duchess, is visiting in the states. When they are ready to return to England, Mr. French considers returning with her.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Jody makes up an invisible friend, but it is a large bear.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: A young girl likes Jody, and shows her affection in the only way children know how - she picks on him and hits him.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Bill thinks he will have a relaxing day, but the children come in to ask for his help. Jody wants help with a friend, Buffy needs to go to a Brownie meeting, and Cissy wants him to talk to the hospital staff about her being a candy striper.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Buffy goes to dance class but finds her teacher is not there. While waiting to be picked up, she meets some kids playing a game and joins them. When Mr. French sees her new friends, he realizes they are just looking to get in trouble.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Bill falls over one of the twin's toys, and realizes they constantly have toys out which makes the place messy. Bill tells the twins that any toy left out will be taken away from them.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Jody and Buffy try out for the stick-ball team that plays on their street. Only one of the twins has skill and is accepted on the team.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: The twins compete for Uncle Bill's undivided attention. Each seems to think he likes the other twin better.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude gets contrary and is ready to mow down 'The Duke' with a verbal barrage when he stops in Tuckahoe to publicize a movie. John Wayne, playing himself, plans to have lunch in the home of his number-one fan -- Dr. Arthur Harmon.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: With the weight of the women's lib movement resting squarely on her shoulders, Maude takes up her duties as manager over three men in a real estate office.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude is spending every spare minute with a handsome, best-selling author and Walter resents it. Walter thinks Barry Witherspoon is a pompous bore, regardless of his sexual preferences, but Maude defends him and accuses Walter of bigotry.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's mother pays a rare visit, transforming Maude into a quivering mass of guilt and insecurity. Wanting her mother to approve of Walter, whom she has never met, Maude over-reacts, putting the entire household into a state of hysteria.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude decides her marriage is over -- Walter has fallen off the wagon and was seen by her in a compromising situation. Then Walter comes home with hopes of patching things up only to find Maude herself in a compromising situation.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Henry Fonda makes a rare television guest appearance when Maude decides he is an ideal candidate for President of the United States and starts the campaign without him, in the first half of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude persists in spearheading a movement to draft Henry Fonda for President and has everyone around her convinced that she must be a manic-depressive in need of professional care.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's unfailing loyalty to her nephew Steve stretches very thin, and so does Walter's patience, when it becomes evident that his 'free and easy' lifestyle is just a cover-up for his basic lack of responsibility.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude refuses to accept the idea that a noted literary authority would choose to lunch with Vivian at the exclusion of herself. But, when she confronts the two of them, the reality of the situation becomes painfully clear.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude has nothing but good intentions when she hires an ex-convict, but panics after she finds out why he went to prison.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie finds himself in a compromising situation with an attractive waitress after Edith ignores his amorous advances and dashes off to the Sunshine Home.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie finds himself in a compromising situation with an attractive waitress after Edith ignores his amorous advances and dashes off to the Sunshine Home.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: And estranged Archie and Edith are determined to prove to each other that they are perfectly content going their separate ways, in the conclusion of a three-part presentation.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: The family is getting ready to celebrate Mike's good fortune, he's been published. It happens just at the wrong moment because Archie has just been laid off due to the recall of a government contract.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie continues to have problems with finances and with finding another job. At the grocery store, he stresses himself about Edith's spending habits and tries to save money even if it means denting cans to save two cents.

programme.title: La Belle
programme.desc: A ballet in three acts by Jean-Christophe Maillot; music by Tchaikovsky.

programme.title: A Night in Vienna
programme.desc: Authentic Viennese music and dancing from the historic ballrooms of the Hofburg Palace.

programme.title: Mahler: Symphony No. 7
programme.desc: Christoph Eschenbach leads the Orchestre de Paris in the 7th Symphony by Gustav Mahler.

programme.title: Carl Orff: Carmina Burana
programme.desc: Santtu-Matias Rouvali conducts the Gothenburg Symphony Orchestra and Choir in a performance of Carl Orff's cantata "Carmina Burana": vocal soloists are Ylva Stenberg, Brett Sprague, and Olle Persson.

programme.title: LSO Performs Boulanger, Dalbavie und Tschaikowsky
programme.desc: Marta Gardolińska conducts the London Symphony Orchestra in a performance recorded at St Luke's in London on May 18th, 2022; the program consists of a variety of works: D'un Matin de Printemps by Lili Boulanger.

programme.title: Classica Spotlight
programme.desc: Cinematic clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Gershwin's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Belgian conductor Jos van Immerseel leads Anima Eterna Brugge.

programme.title: Mahler - The Youth Wunderhorn
programme.desc: The Youth Wunderhorn (Magic Horn) songs represent an important aspect of Mahler's engagement with the romantic tradition, even as they pave the way for his more famous symphonic works.

programme.title: Chamber music by Mozart and Shostakovich
programme.desc: French violinist Renaud Capuçon appears at the festival Les Coups de Cœur de Chantilly, presenting a chamber music program consisting of classical and 20th century repertoire. He performs with the soloists of the International Menuhin Music Academy.

programme.desc: A boy's toy Batmobile car provides an important clue for detectives struggling to make a case against a serial killer who stalks and kills waitresses.

programme.title: Cold Case Files

programme.title: 18if

programme.title: 18if
programme.desc: Haruto meets Jane Doe, a witch doing whatever she wants in the dream world; Haruto and the others are toyed with as they get caught up in her crazy actions and ideas.

programme.title: 18if

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En una tarde cálida del verano, en el pueblo de Verona, Wisconsin, se enfrentaba a su primer triple homicidio. Para resolver este caso, los investigadores tuvieron que adentrarse en el mundo de jugadores de alto nivel y apuestas fuera del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las vacaciones familiares se convierten en una pesadilla cuando a una mujer la encuentran boca abajo en un lago.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: ¿Quién fue el delincuente sexual que asesinó a dos muchachos adolescentes en Nebraska? La clave para detenerlo sería la composición única de la cuerda basura que usó para amarrar a sus víctimas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1994, Rhoda Nathan fue encontrada asesinada en una habitación de un hotel en Cincinnati.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2003, Tiffany Rowell y tres de sus amigas fueron brutalmente asesinadas en la adinerada área de Clear Lake, Texas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer joven de repente se enferma gravemente y, finalmente, no puede caminar. Una prueba de médula ósea revela la causa: arsénico.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de dispararle a sus víctimas en la cabeza, el asesino limpió la escena, colocó la evidencia incriminatoria en una bolsa de plástico y la arrojó al río.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, el pornógrafo de San Francisco Artie Mitchell fue asesinado en su casa. Su hermano y socio comercial, que fue encontrado cerca del lugar con un rifle, luego confiesa haber disparado a Artie, pero la pregunta es si el disparo fue premeditado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una fría noche de Diciembre de 1993, Rose Larner se detuvo en una tienda cuando se dirigía a la casa de su novio. Nunca más se la vio ni se supo de ella.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pedido fatal
programme.desc: Un hombre es encontrado muerto en su casa y su ex esposa tiene una coartada perfecta. Para determinar la hora de la muerte, los investigadores deben saber cuándo comió la víctima por última vez.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asesinato brutal, muchos sospechosos y pruebas contradictorias, pero los forenses fueron claros en una cosa: el asesino conocía a su víctima. Y eso les dio a los investigadores una ventaja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Acechado en la noche
programme.desc: Cuando una víctima es brutalmente asesinada en su propia cama, los investigadores encuentran una huella de zapato en el barro de afuera, evidencia física que esperan que conduzca al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1990, el cuerpo de Shirley Andronowich fue encontrado mutilado. Los testigos le dijeron a la policía que tuvo una pelea con su esposo la noche anterior, pero la evidencia forense demostró que él no tuvo nada que ver con su muerte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: La pista ardiente
programme.desc: Un pirómano en serie anda suelto en Washington, DC. Cada uno de los incendios se inició con el mismo tipo de dispositivo incendiario.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Testigo presencial
programme.desc: Una adolescente desapareció después de una noche de paseos a caballo. Su cuerpo fue encontrado un mes después, a cinco kilómetros de su casa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, cuando Steven Fortin ataca a la Oficial de Policía Estatal de Maine fuera de su hora servicio, Vicky Gardner, durante una parada rutinaria, se desencadena una serie de eventos que reinician de golpe un caso de asesinato estancado en New Jersey.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Susie Mowbray fue acusada de la muerte de su esposo. Su hijo estaba tan convencido de su inocencia que se matriculó en la facultad de derecho, estudió todas las pruebas y, finalmente, descubrió la verdad de lo que realmente sucedió entre sus padres.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El conductor dijo que no podía haber sido él quien atropelló a un peatón y se fugó en la calle Harrisburg. El Jeep Grand Cherokee que él estaba arrendando en ese entonces había sido vendido meses atrás a otro comprador en otro estado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1985, Julie Estes fue secuestrada de una tienda de conveniencia en Southside donde trabajaba. Su cuerpo fue encontrado al día siguiente, pero el asesinato quedó sin resolver hasta el 2003.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas reveladoras
programme.desc: La desaparición de la atleta universitaria de Filadelfia, Aimee Willard, es investigada después de que su carro fuera encontrado al costado de la carretera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Un recuerdo conmovedor
programme.desc: Una niña inteligente de Visalia, California recuerda dejar huellas dactilares en el vehículo de su secuestrador cuando es secuestrada, lo que ayuda a la policía en su búsqueda junto con una huella de neumático en el barro.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un pediatra, provocada por la misteriosa muerte de uno de sus pacientes, conduce a un hospital de Texas donde la tasa de mortalidad pediátrica es más alta que en cualquier hospital del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, Judy Southern llegó a casa del trabajo y recibió un disparo de un hombre armado que esperaba dentro. Su esposo llegó poco después, llamó a los servicios de emergencia y la llevó al hospital.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Suela reveladora
programme.desc: Armada con solo eso, la policía esperaba que las huellas de zapatos encontradas en la escena del crimen de Michigan, volvieran a encarrilar su investigación sobre el asesinato de Audrey Nichols.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El Septiembre de 1984, en un suburbio de Tucson, Arizona, Vicki Hoskins, de ocho años, salió de su casa en su bicicleta rosada para enviar una carta a su madre. Ella nunca regresó, pero su bicicleta ligeramente dañada fue encontrada en las cercanías.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La escena del crimen era especialmente violenta: un esposo y una esposa fueron asesinados a tiros en su habitación. ¿Fue cómplice su hija de 16 años?

programme.desc: Holly J’s convinced she can do it all - score her dream co-op placement, be there for Sav while Alli’s missing and juggle her job at Little Miss Steaks.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige organizes a final hurrah at the beach and even convinces her older brother, Dylan, to act as chauffeur. Spinner’s a bit put-off by Dylan’s openly gay attitude, but his presence is an eye-opener for Marco.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham is out to determine whether the Himalayan Yeti and the Sumatran Orang Pendek exist.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham embarks on a mission to investigate the existence of the mythical giant squid.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham searches for clues related to the existence of the Loch Ness Monster in Scotland. He also visits Australia to learn about a giant lizard called Megalania.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham sets out in search of stories about Bigfoot, a mythical ape-like creature that has been the focus of many fiction novels, movies and documentaries over the years.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham explores the English countryside to learn about mythical big cats such as the Beast of Bodmin and Beast of Exmoor.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham investigates whether the thylacine, aka Tasmanian tiger or Tasmanian wolf, has truly gone extinct. The species lived in Australia and Tasmania.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: It is only in recent years that experts have unearthed the biggest dinosaurs that ever lived. One monster eclipsed all others, more than seven times as heavy as Diplodocus was the immense Argentinosaurus.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A new generation of carnivores was about to take killing to the next level. At the end of the Cretaceous period, these new hunter killers had spread throughout the globe.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A look at bizarre dinosaurs such as the curious buck-toothed Epidexipteryx, the amazing four-winged Microraptor and the pot-bellied Nothronychus.

programme.title: How to Build a Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dinosaurs died out 65 million years ago, and we have hardly ever found a complete skeleton. So how do we turn a pile of broken bones into a dinosaur exhibit? Dr Alice Roberts finds out how the experts put skeletons back together.

programme.title: Living with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: David Attenborough learns that descendants of the dinosaur age are alive and well. David explores how they survived the catastrophes that wiped out other species.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring the newfound remains of a dinosaur species considered the biggest carnivore in history, all while questioning whether they engaged in a fight against the Argentinosaurus.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Bird expert Bill Oddie helps construct amazing, life-sized, biomechanical replicas as he presents an imaginary battle between a tyrannosaurus rex and a triceratops.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Here, Bill Oddie asks whether the Velociraptor was really the monstrous predator of popular legend.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough shows us how ancient creatures have come to be preserved as fossils and how those fossils can shed light on characteristics of these creatures' lives, and even their death.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Chihuahua mix with aggression issues; a Pomeranian with severe separation anxiety; an Aussie/Shar Pei mix who runs away when his owner coughs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Two wolf hybrids with aggression issues; an aggressive Chihuahua.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A basset hound is afraid of her owner's husband; a blue heeler mix with unique bedtime rituals.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Yorkie attacks his leash, plants and a fellow Yorkie; a bull terrier attacks larger dogs; a Jack Russell terrier/Italian greyhound mix barks constantly while her owner is at work.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar Milan's Dog Psychology Center in Los Angeles is both the home and refuge to nearly 50 dogs who are a resource in his work.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar's toughest cases have included a bulldog that munched on skateboards, a dog that gnawed garden hoses and basketballs, and a pit bull with issues.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Australian shepherd bites people and lunges at strangers since losing an eye; a hound from an animal-testing lab fears people; a Maltese shows aggressive behavior and relieves itself on the carpet.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A blue heeler/Australian shepherd mix is overprotective of his owners; a school bus severely injures an American Staffordshire terrier; finding a new companion for a French bulldog.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A blue heeler puts herself in danger chasing her owner's pickup truck; an American Eskimo/border collie mix won't walk; a golden retriever is aggressive.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A firehouse Dalmatian; a dog becomes aggressive toward his owners after being attacked by two other dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A border collie/springer spaniel mix bolts toward small animals; a shepherd mix has a biting problem; a pushy poodle.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Basset hounds sibling rivalry; aggressive dog; possessive poodle-mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a disrespectful yellow Lab who causes chaos everywhere she goes and some dogs who are misbehaving at the office.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A French bulldog fails the doggy day-care entrance exam; three Jack Russell terriers fight one another for their owner's attention; a beagle howls incessantly while on walks.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition, she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team, Baby Lyssa decides she will step up in this hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker. As Dog begins his hunt for a young man who has trouble showing up at court, Tim has his own mission--convince Duane Lee to meet with him.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound? As the family heads out for the seedier side of Honolulu in search of an erotic dancer, we will find out if the wound is truly healed.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When can a bounty hunt also be a date? When Dog and Beth decide to ride in the same SUV as they pursue a runaway fugitive, will their different approaches to the investigation lead to a capture and romance?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an alleged abuser goes on, the lame Dog gathers the team to bring him in. As the leads grow colder, Dog's determination only grows stronger. Finally, a hot lead comes in and Dog sets the trap for his prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and company head to the Big Island in pursuit of two courthouse no-shows, only to find that one of them appears to be posting status updates from Southern California.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The cameras are turned around, as we get a tour of life "behind the scenes" on Dog the Bounty Hunter. Using interviews with Dog and the posse, the TV crew, and never before seen footage, this is one of most revealing and heartfelt episodes of the series.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive spells trouble for Dog in today's hunt. When the leads grow cold, it's the US Postal Service to the rescue as a mail carrier lends a helping hand. Dog's team surrounds the suspected safe house and silently awaits their prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's case involves a Samoan, so Dog knows that the runner's close-knit kinfolk holds the keys to bringing him in. Dog's plan is to convince the family that everyone is best served if the fugitive mans up and takes care of business.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target for today was once an upstanding member of his community. Now with no home, no job, and the law on his trail, this middle-aged exile from middle-class society is using the cold end of an ice pipe to soothe his troubled soul.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog hunts down Chris, a fugitive wanted on drug charges. Dog turns over every rock, but to no avail. Later, they decides to revoke the bonds they holds on Chris's mother and stepfather because they've violated the conditions of their own bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Once a criminal himself, Dog knows how it feels to be hunted. In this episode, Dog and the team delve into the depths of Honolulu's Chinatown as they search for a young Samoan girl who's gone down the wrong path. After a frustrating day of hunting, D

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In Hawaii, Dog sets off from Honolulu to Kona to help his son Leland with some of his fugitives. First, a stop at Leland's boxing gym to warm up for their day of hunting with a quick sparring session and some father-and-son time together.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has a big problem. Patty Estabilio has jumped a $15,000 bail bond and disappeared into Hawaii's underworld. Kissing the kids good night, Dog and Beth, with Tim and Leland at their side, plunge into a drug-infused netherworld.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team return to their roots, with a visit to their home town of Denver. Dog and Tim begin the day with an early morning radio show appearance, and it pays off when a listener calls in with a tip about one of the fugitives they're hunting.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Justin is the low man on the totem pole in the Chapman clan, and this means that the rest of the team is always teasing him. But Justin wants to be a full-fledged member of the team, and Dog has a fugitive that will be his test case.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While hunting an elusive deep sea fisherman, Dog is also trying to plan a great Mother's Day for Beth, but he's having problems finding the special flowers Beth wants.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: New series focusing on the tumultuous home and professional life of bounty hunter Dwayne "Dog" Chapman, and his partner and wife Beth. In the first episode, Dog and team chase Floyd Chapman (no relation), a heavily tattooed bail jumper.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Upset because one his puppies may die and wanting to give the little guy a second chance in life, Dog decides to offer one of the fugitives a second chance, too. He captures Paul, a meth addict, then steers him to a rehab program instead of jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after Virginia, a hard-to-find lawbreaker. He gets a tip that a pickup truck will be going to Virginia's house. In true private-eye fashion, the team tails the truck in two SUVs, regularly switching the follow car to throw off their scent.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after a fugitive named Tracy who lives in a homeless shelter, but the shelter's staff is uncooperative, and the two sides get into an angry confrontation that forces Dog to temporarily back off.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to liven things up with a competition. He and Beth will hunt for one fugitive, while Leland and Justin chase another. The winner will be the duo that captures its fugitive first. Will Dog keep bragging rights as the Best Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is hunting a man known as The Godfather of Waikiki. Dog and Beth bailed him out as a courtesy, but now he is refusing to go to court. If Dog doesn't bring him in, it could cost him more than money; he may lose his respect on the street.

programme.desc: Mallory is horrified and confused when a close family friend and older business associate of her father makes a pass at her.

programme.desc: When a blizzard forces the Keatons to spend Christmas at home, Elyse's gift to Steven an album filled with fascinating old photos sparks flashbacks to the births of their three children.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: With the FBI hot on Ned's heels for embezzling 4.5 million dollars in corporate funds, Elyse's ethical brother and Alex's idol tells the family why and where he hid the money.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex amasses a bundle by playing the stock market on paper for his economics class, and courts disaster by secretly investing his father's money.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory's handsome but shy French tutor, Jeff, finally musters up the nerve to ask her out and then courts disaster by enlisting Alex's advice on how to behave on the date.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Soon after freelance architect Elyse Keaton hires her friend Suzanne Davis to handle clerical chores, she wants to fire the under-qualified, overly aggressive secretary.
