programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: With the Fire Nation on the brink of global domination, a young girl and her brother discover a 12-year old Airbender who reveals himself as the Avatar. Will this irresponsible kid accept his destiny in time to save the world?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: With the Fire Nation on the brink of global domination, a young girl and her brother discover a 12-year old Airbender who reveals himself as the Avatar. Will this irresponsible kid accept his destiny in time to save the world?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Katara and Sokka, a brother and sister from the Southern Water Tribe, discover a twelve-year-old boy frozen in an iceberg. Katara wonders if this boy is the Avatar whom the world has been awaiting for a hundred years.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Prince Zuko, a young Firebender whose mission in life is to capture the Avatar, tracks Aang down to the Southern Water Tribe village where Katara and Sokka live.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang is eager to take Sokka and Katara to the Air Temple where he was raised. But upon arrival, it becomes apparent that the temple is not at all how Aang remembers it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When locals of a small island discover Aang is the Avatar, they treat him like a celebrity.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang takes Katara and Sokka to an Earthbender city. The kids cause damage and are brought before a crazy old king, who seems to enjoy messing with the kids' heads.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The kids come to an Earth Nation town which is occupied by the Fire Nation. But will Katara's attempts to inspire the oppressed people help them or hurt them?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka arrive at a town being terrorized by a mysterious force from the spirit world. Aang doesn't know how to help these people, and realizes he has much to learn about being the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Our heroes' friendship is tested when they meet Jet, a charismatic teenager leading a band of rebels who are fighting against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: A powerful storm brings up painful memories of the past - and puts everyone in jeopardy in the present.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives - but they are so reliant that they are blind to the immanent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: After hearing rumors about surviving Airbenders, the kids journey to the Northern Air temple to see for themselves. What they find there could spell disaster for all enemies of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The kids reach the Northern Water tribe, and Aang and Katara look for a Waterbending Master as Sokka falls for a princess. Meanwhile, Zhao plans an attack and Zuko must find a way to continue his quest for the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao’s Fire Navy fleet. In the heat of battle, Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn’t a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Zhao’s invasion breaks through the outer wall of the Northern Water Tribe’s defenses, and he reveals a sinister plan. Aang goes to the spirit world for help – but will he return in time to stop Zhao and prevent the destruction of the Water Tribe?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang and the group meet an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use Aang's powerful “Avatar State” as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: On their way to Omashu, the kids become lost in the treacherous "Cave of Two Lovers."

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang enters Omashu so he can learn Earthbending from King Bumi, but the city is in the hands of the Fire Nation!

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When the kids end up in a mysterious and strange swamp, their fears are exposed. And Aang learns about being "connected to the Earth" from an unlikely teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang must clear up a wave of anti-Avatar sentiment and atone for something he did in the past.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang discovers a possible Earthbending mentor at an underground tournament.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A Malibu Hills fire is the backdrop for rising tensions between the residents; a disgraced stockbroker, a naturalist, a worried father, and a land developer. A worried Dr. Sloan deals with his own parental fears when Steve helps fight the fire.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Community General is already under increased security, with a high-profile criminal hospitalized, when an important businesswoman is brought in. Mark suspects her security guard has deadly intentions.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse's new part-time job as a trainer of the pro basketball Mustangs turns deadly when he's accused of murdering a star player.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan investigates a plastic surgeon when an actress's death apparently results from an infection contracted during surgery.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark and Amanda are assigned to the task force investigating an airplane crash. An adversarial FBI agent and Russian mobsters make their assignment more difficult.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Gillespie is let go after being abducted by white supremacists right before the upcoming visit of a civil rights leader, Rev. John Carter, and the anniversary of a historic march. Tibbs is excited to meet Carter, but Gillespie anticipates trouble.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Officer Parker Williams must face his feelings when his neighbor, a dance instructor he's fallen for, is accused of killing a private investigator who was hot on her trail regarding the alleged abduction of the child she's raising as her daughter.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Two men are determined to avenge their brother's death after he is killed in a thwarted armed robbery by an off-duty Lieutenant Bubba Skinner. Chief Gillespie must prepare to do all he can to keep Bubba safe. Now, he just needs Bubba to cooperate.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: While hitchhiking his way to Sparta to visit Chief Gillespie, a Vietnamese teenager, Hank, witnesses a store robbery that turns into a murder. Hank was hoping that Gillespie would help him acquire citizenship, but now he's being framed for murder.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Ex-prizefighter, King Baylor, tries to blackmail his old boss, John Caminetto, a mafia kingpin in Detroit, who is wanted by the FBI. The FBI offers Baylor a deal, but he's desperate for cash and thinks he can force Caminetto to pay a bigger sum.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Amos Haber, a close friend of Chief Gillespie's, is devastated over the death of his wife and angrily blames her doctor, vowing revenge. When the doctor is found shot to death, the bullets match a gun belonging to Amos, but is Amos the killer?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A mild-mannered Sparta businessman shoots his wife and her lover and then flees with his daughter, holding her hostage in the family cabin out in the woods. The Sparta police must move with caution in fear he may shoot his daughter and then himself.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: After $100,000 goes missing from the bank where he works, Daryl Tyler, a friend of Bubba's, is framed for theft and kills himself. Only his young son knows the truth that could clear his late father's name; however, for now, he won't say a word.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Alex sends Walker and Trivette to go bring back a man who killed a ranger who was sent bring him in. Walker is sullen; it seems that the ranger who was killed was a friend of his and that Walker was the one who was suppose to bring the man in.

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Victoria tries to win over the difficult kids of a man she likes, Elka is resistant to wintering in Florida with Max, and Melanie and Joy volunteer at a senior center.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: As Victoria interviews the governor's candidly opportunistic wife, Elka goes on trial and attempts to sway the verdict by flirting with an elderly juror.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Elka's on the lam and the women go looking for her…in Amish country. Meanwhile, Joy's a source of scandal as the Governor's alleged mistress and faces deportation while Victoria finds herself a little too "at home" with the Amish.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: The women are terrified that an ex-con Victoria deceived will show up at the house, and Joy finally meets her son Owen, who thinks it may be best not to stay in contact.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: After getting each other dates for another shared fake birthday, the women's night involves a Jesus look-alike, Siamese twins, an impressionist, and an astute waiter.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: While rehearsing for a battle of the bands, Rick poaches away talented lead singer Joy, leaving Melanie, Victoria and Elka no choice but to use autotune microphones.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Joy learns from a fertility clinic director that Rick is their most sought-after donor, and Victoria method-acts as an old woman to land a prestigious stage role.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Looking for "GBFFs" like they had in L.A., the women go to a gay bar, where Victoria is mistaken for a drag queen, and Elka punches out her former best friend.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Victoria tries to convince her daughter Emmy not to release a tell-all book, while Melanie and Joy are screened by a kid to be his father's new wife.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Targeted by a handsome news anchor's pranks, Victoria asks Joy to help her even the score, while Melanie gives a guy another chance and finds out he's a foot worshipper.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine
programme.desc: Christine's attraction to Ritchie's teacher, Mr. Harris, causes a scene at a school fundraiser—especially after Ritchie wins a playdate with him and is unable to go.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine
programme.desc: When Christine realizes she can't afford the newly raised tuition at Ritchie's school, she tries to get help from everyone except the person who is offering it freely: Barb.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine
programme.desc: Christine decides to make Richard responsible for helping Ritchie complete a big homework assignment, but soon she takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine
programme.desc: Now that Barb is a co-owner of Christine's women's gym, the two women don't always agree on how to run it. Meanwhile, Matthew helps Ritchie find the perfect nanny to replace him.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine
programme.desc: After a car accident, Christine rents a huge luxury vehicle and guiltily enjoys it. Also, New Christine and Richard use unorthodox methods to teach Ritchie the U.S. state capitals.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine
programme.desc: Christine reluctantly signs Ritchie up for soccer after Mr. Harris informs her and Richard that Ritchie is having trouble making friends.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine
programme.desc: After Christine convinces Matthew to let her come with him to his friend's party, she learns about her brother's colorful friends and a pretty ex-girlfriend.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine
programme.desc: After Christine recommends a thoughtful birthday gift for New Christine to give attentive, romantic Richard, Christine can't tolerate his not knowing whose idea the present really was.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: When Rochelle orders a copy of her birth certificate, she realizes that she is actually one year younger than she thought she was and decides to start living her life with a new, younger attitude.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Chris is determined to spend New Year's Eve in Times Square, but Rochelle says Chris can only go if he finds a responsible adult to accompany him. The only problem is that the only people Chris can find to be his chaperone are two ex-convicts.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Chris and Greg decide to join the wrestling team to land a varsity jacket to impress the ladies.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Chris and Greg realize they'd better find fake IDs or they won't be able to go to the '18 and over' Fat Boys concert. Rochelle plans a surprise party for Julius.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Knowing that he needs to score well to help him get into college, Chris decides to cram for his PSAT test. When Rochelle makes the family attend a social event, Chris is left with no time to study and resorts to buying the PSAT answer key.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Coach Thurman witnesses Chris being bullied by Caruso and suggests Chris learn to box to defend himself.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma cae otra vez en la farsa de Dínora quien se ingenia una insólita historia con Gabriela de cómplice, Martín sospecha de su hija. Jimena regresa con tropiezos a la filmación del comercial.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los matones ponen una bomba en la hacienda Reyes pero se equivocan de carro, Franco descubre que fue un atentado en su contra. Martín aconseja a Sara y confronta a Gabriela y a Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco llega al restaurante y Armando queda impresionado, Reyes culpa a Rosario del atentado por perseguirlo. Martín le dice a Norma que Dínora, Gabriela y Fernando quieren separarla de Juan.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Óscar y Jimena alargan su divorcio, él le pide que ayude a Juan, lo mismo hace Franco con Sara, las dos prometen hablar con Norma. Rosario reconoce que su matrimonio es un fracaso.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando se queja con Gabriela de la paliza que le dieron los Reyes, Sara revela que él la atacó y le dice a Norma que su mamá y Dínora buscan alejarla de Juan. Óscar descubre a Eva.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma renuncia al consultorio, le asusta la cercanía de Fernando con Juan David, también Ruth se retira de la Casa de Modas por presión de su mamá. Juan se niega a asistir a la cena de Dínora.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora tiene una trampa para comprometer a Juan, pero Franco y Óscar planean otra para ella. Ruth le cuenta a Raquel lo que dijo Calixto sobre su madre y Rosario le pide el divorcio a Armando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora estalla de rabia porque Juan no llega y su trampa se cae, Franco y Óscar le aclaran que él ama a Norma, quien lo busca en la hacienda. Las Elizondo creen que Martín fue secuestrado.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan y Norma buscan a Dínora, la ven en una vergonzosa situación y ella no puede aclarar lo que pasó, atrapada en su red de mentiras. Gabriela y Fernando le echan a perder la fiesta a Martín.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín está al borde de la muerte, sus nietas lloran junto a él, porque el médico dijo que no vale la pena llevarlo al hospital, Gabriela solloza afligida, en cambio, Fernando siente alivio.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma acude a su cita con Juan, pero se va al ver que no está solo, Óscar enfrenta a Jimena delante de Gabriela, quien se indigna al saber lo sucedido. Franco busca desquitarse de los matones.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora le inventa a Norma que es novia de Juan, él no se queda tranquilo, busca a la madre de su hijo y trata de aclarar todo cuando otra mentira los separa. Franco pone a Armando en su sitio.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: "The Amazing Race" celebrates travelling one million miles around the world when the 32nd race kicks off from Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Bogotá, Colombia, where they encounter the "Yield," which gives them the power to stop another team's race for a designated amount of time.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams are in Manaus, Brazil, where they have big decisions to make when they encounter the first U-turn of the race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Asunción, Paraguay, where they must either stack a pyramid of watermelons or perform a traditional Paraguayan bottle dance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams in Paris, France, must whip up some tasty treats and make enough Chantilly cream for four pies, as well as compete in a series of carnival games.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams reach new heights in Berlin, as they walk face-first down the exterior of a building for nearly 200 feet.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Almaty, Kazakhstan, where they brave the cold weather while perfecting a choreographed fight scene and decorate a yurt.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Hyderabad, India, where they must complete double the detours, double the road blocks and travel double the distance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The first ever mega leg in race history continues through Hyderabad, India, where teams compete in double the detours and double the road blocks, and travel double the distance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams race through Siem Reap, Cambodia, where they face the second and final double U-turn of the season.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In the first city sprint, the final four teams race through Manila, the capital of the Philippines, where they have no road blocks and no detours.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the $1 million prize on the line, the final three teams travel to New Orleans, where one team is crowned the winner.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Amazing Race begins its historic 33rd trip around the world when 11 new teams take off from their homes and travel to their first destination, London, England.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Amazing Race begins its historic 33rd trip around the world when 11 new teams take off from their homes and travel to their first destination, London, England.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Deputy Barney Fife invests his life's savings in a used car that turns out to be a lemon.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie suffers from puppy love so Barney attempts to show him how to handle women.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney decides that it's time to push Andy into matrimony, but Barney's marriage bureau collapses at a frantic dinner party.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A pack of hunting dogs overruns the Mayberry Courthouse just as Andy is trying to impress a visiting state official.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Howard Morris guest stars as Ernest T. Bass as the Darling clan returns to Mayberry with its own kind of mountain trouble.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife becomes super-efficient in executing his duties as a deputy sheriff after two thieves are jailed in Mayberry until their accomplices are captured.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie accidentally kills a bird with a slingshot and becomes foster-mother to her three young birds.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy, Barney and Gomer are a trio of laughs as they tread the boards of a haunted house.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Guest star Howard Morris plays the part of a mountain man very disgruntled with being rejected by the army.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A visiting preacher urges the residents of Mayberry to relax and enjoy the simple pleasures of life--leading to more work for all.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee is the unwilling object of matrimony when mountaineer Briscoe Darling comes a'courting.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gossiping Gomer Pyle moves in with the sheriff when he loses his job and home at the filling station.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ron Howard's real-life father and younger brother appear as Mayberry gets involved with a gold shipment en route to Fort Knox.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie seems in line for a new bicycle as he comes home with an all A report card.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife plays cupid for Gomer when Barney's girl refuses to go to a dance unless her cousin also has a date.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney is evicted from his rooming house for illegal cooking and moves into the Mayberry sheriff's office backroom much to Andy's chagrin.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney tickets Gomer for a U-turn and is then detained in a citizen's arrest by Gomer for the same thing.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie and his chums take their roles as Robin Hood and his merry men seriously as they befriend a hobo at the expense of the pantries of Mayberry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney organizes a rescue party when Andy and Helen are trapped in a cave by a landslide.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie learns a lesson in friendship when he befriends a newcomer to Mayberry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee stirs up a crusade for a chicken farmer whose property has been condemned to make way for a new road.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney adds a vintage motorcycle to the rolling stock of the Mayberry Sheriff's department, to the Sheriff's regret.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ernest T. Bass is a would-be Romeo, who is brought into the sheriff's home in an effort to teach him some manners.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A beautiful prisoner threatens to crumble the security of the Mayberry jail, as both Andy and Barney fall for her charms.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Otis Campbell acquires a car and threatens life and limb of Mayberry's pedestrian population.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack is dating a sex therapist who has asked him to keep her job a secret. Janet, concluding she is a prostitute, is nasty to her and no one can understand why - especially when Janet's own father has become so friendly with her.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack has two dates, so he talks Larry into posing as him and spending the day with his unwanted date, Janet's childhood friend, who is visiting from out of town.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack believes he has won a baking contest that is open only to women. Disguised as "Grandma Tripper," he goes to collect the check and learns that he is a finalist and must bake his cookies for the company's executives to win the prize.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's father visits unexpectedly and resumes his good nature meddling. Jack explodes and tells him to stay out of his life, but when he learns his father has lost his job, Jack gives him the opportunity to be useful.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri is up for a promotion and tells Dr. Kenderson she is married to ward off his advances. When he invites himself and his wife over for dinner, Jack poses as Terri's husband while Janet and Larry pose as French-speaking house guests.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Jack attends a charity ball with a socialite and loses $15,000 gambling, Larry and the girls attempt to help him recover the money.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The girls flip over a handsome Englishman who moves in next door, but Jack and Furley become convinced that he is one of London's most sought after criminals.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet is thrilled with her new job as an aerobics teacher, and her new boss Tina is thrilled with Jack. When Tina blackmails Jack into being at her beck and call, Larry offers to take her off Jack's hands.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an old flame at the park who is seeking advice about her jealous husband. Furley joins them, and they all get poison oak. Later, at Jack's house, Furley tells the husband they were all in the bushes together.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Furley get locked in a freezer together. Convinced they are going to die, they have a heart-to-heart talk, and Jack confesses that he really isn't gay. Once safe, Jack worries because Furley knows the truth about him.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The trio plants a stray cat at Furley's door, hoping he'll bend his rules and keep it. When a girl appears looking for her kitten, Furley lies and says he took it to the pound; so Jack and the girls search the pounds and bring home three different cats.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: After a night on the town with his old navy buddies, Jack discovers he has a tattoo on his derriere. When Jack goes to the hospital to have it removed, Janet thinks he is having a vasectomy and Furley thinks he is having a sex change.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack offers to model for a beautiful art teacher and finds himself nude in front of her classroom when Furley walks in. Jack begs Furley not to tell, but the secret is out when a nude portrait of Jack appears at the Regal Beagle.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack borrows Janet's new car to drive a gorgeous model to a photo session and totals the car on the way home. He pretends to have amnesia in the hospital, but Janet gets suspicious and concocts a plan to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A customer of the flower shop names Janet in his will, and she receives a vase. His nephew, Philip, an art collector, visits Janet, and Jack thinks he lied about the value of the vase and is trying to get it back.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an attractive stewardess, Vicky Bradford; but between her father and her dates, she doesn't seem to have time for Jack. Janet announces her engagement to Philip, while Jack is jealous and lovesick.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack thinks Vicky wants a job in Houston and encourages her, causing her to think he wants to end their relationship. She interrupts Janet's wedding to find out why. They make up and the ceremony resumes. Jack proposes and is stunned by Vicky's refusal.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Vicky explains that she is afraid of marriage and suggests to Jack that they live together. Jack reluctantly agrees. They are toasting their first night together in their new apartment when they are interrupted by Mr. Bradford.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: In order to convince their landlord, Mr. Roper, that there is nothing going on between them and their new male roommate, Chrissy and Janet tell him that Jack is gay.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy's visiting mother, not knowing that the girls have rented the spare room to Jack, causes havoc when she decides to spend the night with them.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Roper feels convinced that his niece will be safe going out with Jack, and Jack would rather be with Janet and Chrissy celebrating Janet's birthday, until he sees the niece.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's fast-talking friend, Larry, gives Jack and the girls a puppy and the kids go to all lengths keeping this from Roper who forbids animals in his building.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack has guilt feelings about not standing up to the tough guy who makes a play for Chrissy at the local pub and goes back the next night to tell the Casanova off.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Panic reigns in the apartment when Mr. Roper takes the rent money without leaving the girls and Jack a receipt, making them think their place was robbed.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Chrissy walk in while Janet is entertaining a date, fostering a new rule on privacy.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack, realizing he can't meet his obligations to pay his share of the rent, gets a part-time modeling job only to find out that he's expected to pose nude. Guest Star(s): Sally Kirkland

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Erik Morales 1
programme.desc: On March 19th, 2005, Erik Morales fought Manny Pacquiao for the WBC and IBA Super Featherweight Titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. In a great fight that went the distance, Morales got the best of Pacquiao who seemed to have an off-night.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Jeff Horn
programme.desc: On July 2nd, 2017 Manny Pacquiao battled Jeff Horn for the WBO World Welterweight title at the Suncorp Stadium in Brisbane in a 12 round bout that ended in a victory for Horn.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Juan Manuel Marquez 1
programme.desc: Manny Pacquiao and Juan Manuel Marquez fought their first match in 2004, resulting in a controversial draw. Both fighters displayed incredible skill, but no clear winner emerged setting the stage for their epic rivarly.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Juan Manuel Marquez 2
programme.desc: On March 15th, 2008 Manny Pacquiao faced Juan Manuel Marquez the second time at Mandalay Bay Resort in Las Vegas for the WBC World Super feather weight titles with Marquez going down in round 3 Pacquiaos win was secured by split decision.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Juan Manuel Marquez 3
programme.desc: On November 12th, 2011 Manny Pacquiao and Juan Manuel Marquez fought for the third time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for WBO World Welterweight titles ending in a victory for Pacquiao in this 12 round bout.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Juan Manuel Marquez 4
programme.desc: On December 8th, 2012, Manny Pacquiao and Juan Manuel Marquez fought for their fourth and final fight. The bout ended in a stunning knockout victory for Marquez, solidifying their rivalry as one of the most memorable in boxing history.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Miguel Cotto
programme.desc: On November 14th, 2009, Manny Pacquiao fought Miguel Cotto for the WBO and WBC Diamond Welterweight Titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Pacquiao put on a dominant performance, forcing the ref to stop the fight in round 12.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: On December 6th, 2008 Manny Pacquiao battled Oscar De La Hoya at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a thrilling bout that lasted 8/12 rounds resulting in a victory for Pacquiao.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Timothy Bradley III
programme.desc: On April 9th, 2016 Manny Pacquiao faced Timothy Bradley for the third time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the WBO International Welterweight title in a 12 round bout Bradley went down in round 7 and 9 resulting in a success for Pacquiao.

programme.title: Marvin Hagler vs John Mugabi
programme.desc: On March 10th, 1986 Marvin Hagler and John Mugabi fought at the Caesars Palace Outdoor Arena in Las Vegas for IBF, WBA and WBC world middleweight titles while Mugabi was ranked number 1 by all three bodies the fight ended in a victory for Hagler.

programme.title: Marvin Hagler vs Thomas Hearns
programme.desc: On April 15th, 1985, Marvin Hagler fought Thomas Hearns for the undisputed Middleweight Title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas. Hagler and Hearns absolutely went at it from the bell which ended with Hagler securing a thrilling knockout victory.

programme.title: Matthew Saad Muhammad vs Yaqui Lopez 1
programme.desc: On October 24th, 1978 Matthew Saad Muhammad fought Yaqui Lopez for the first time for Light Heavyweight titles at the Spectrum in Philidelphia, in a 15 round bout that ended in the fourteenth round securing the victory for Muhammad.

programme.title: Michael Carabajal vs Jorge Arce
programme.desc: On July 31st, 1999 Michael Carabajal faced Jorge Arce for the WBO World Light flyweight title at Plaza de Toros El Toreo in Tijuana in a 12 round bout that went 11 rounds giving the bout to Carabajal.

programme.title: Michael Carbajal vs Humberto Gonzalez 1
programme.desc: On March 13th, 1993, Michael Carbajal fought Humberto Gonzalez for the WBC and IBF Light Flyweight Titles in Las Vegas. After being knocked down twice earlier in the fight, Carbajal made an incredible comeback, knocking out Gonzalez in the 7th round.

programme.desc: For 6 seasons, the Ax Men have been chasing huge paydays in the most dangerous conditions imaginable. Now, Season Seven is gearing up to be the toughest yet, and we're taking a look back at the logging legacies of the companies who have made it this far.

programme.title: Ax Men: Logged and Loaded
programme.desc: The crews of Ax Men are back and the race for green gold is on! In Washington, Rygaard pushes deep into their roughest terrain yet in an effort to recapture the title.

programme.title: Ax Men: Falling Fast
programme.desc: It's only the second week into the logging season, but it seems like the teams could already use a break. In Alaska, the Papac team fights to find a replacement to fill the shoes of injured Coatsy.

programme.title: Ax Men: Failure to Communicate
programme.desc: It's week three, and the loggers are feeling the pressure to produce. In Alaska, Coatsy is still out of commission, so Papac institutes an extremely dangerous process called Shotgun Logging.

programme.title: Ax Men: The Swampman Cometh
programme.desc: Shelby the Swampman uses an airboat to search for a treasure trove of century old logs in a legendary lost canal. In Washington, Rygaard tries to haul out the biggest log on their site, a mammoth six-ton cypress.

programme.title: Ax Men: High Wire Act
programme.desc: In Louisiana, Shelby looks to repair his custom made two-ton swamp buggy. In Alaska, Coatsy returns to the Papac worksite. In the Pacific Northwest, the Rygaard crew must climb over a hundred feet in the air to top a new lift tree.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty

programme.title: Duck Dynasty

programme.title: Duck Dynasty

programme.desc: The U.S. military denies that the 1947 Roswell crash involved anything other than a weather balloon, but theorists claim that other UFO crashes were reported all over the world at the same time as the crash and that the wreckages were retrieved.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Ancient mythologies tell stories of humans being abducted by otherworldly beings, even as thousands of people continue to report being taken by aliens and then returned with implants and genetic mutations.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: After Apollo 17 in 1972, the United States ends the Apollo program, leaving some to wonder if the astronauts found more than what NASA wants the public to know.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Theorists suggest that extraterrestrials have been communicating with mathematicians and engineers through the universal language of mathematics and binary code, influencing Nikolai Fyodorov and other visionaries to advocate for space exploration.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Theorists suggest that the iconic religious symbol of the cosmic egg demonstrates that human ancestors possessed a knowledge of the DNA double-helix spiral and human biological coding.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Michael faces a firing squad when he attempts to rescue a Foundation contact arrested in a military coup.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Michael poses as a stuntman in an effort to catch the deadly saboteur who is terrorizing a movie set.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: DeSoto is forced to give medical treatment without authorization when the radio link to the hospital is broken; guest Lloyd Bochner.

programme.title: Emergency!

programme.title: Emergency!

programme.title: Emergency!

programme.desc: The Rampart staff struggles to save a girl injured by a drunken driver; Gage's Indian heritage becomes the topic of a feud with Chet.

programme.title: Emergency!

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Miami police detective Sonny Crockett reluctantly teams with New York-bred newcomer Ricardo Tubbs.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Vice detectives Crockett and Tubbs join forces to capture a Colombian drug kingpin in the pilot episode of the series.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Crockett and Tubbs are skeptical of rumors the undercover FBI agent (Ed O'Neill) has betrayed their operation.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Crockett and Tubbs must enlist an unreliable petty thief (Charlie Barnett) to help bust a Jamaican drug operation.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Tubbs works to save Crockett and family from falling victim to an Argentine assassin hired by drug boss Calderone.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: While on the trail of Calderone in Bimini, Tubbs falls in love with a woman who forces him to consider his loyalties.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Crockett, his protégé and a friend (Kiel Martin) investigate a professor for a series of drug-related student deaths.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A police detective questions a jewelry-store owner whose late nephew had a winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo attends his nephew's wedding and as the couple get ready to leave on their honeymoon, the bride disappears; Columbo investigates and suspects his nephew may have made a few enemies on the police force.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates a hit-and-run, followed by a car explosion.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Two women kill their two-timing lover but have solid alibis; one of the women tries to seduce Columbo to keep him off her trail.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates a case involving argumentative radio talk show host Fielding Chase.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The detective is put on the case of a man who murders his brother.

programme.title: Columbo

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The inimitable cop must prove that a flamboyant Hollywood gossip reporter was murdered by her former lover.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A Hollywood film composer and conductor murders a talented, young musician out of jealousy.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Jen works through grief and finds peace. Tensions escalate when Duffey hosts a matchmaking event: Malaysia's unexpected guest rattles Brandi, Brittish navigates new issues with her ex-fiancé, and Jackie meddles with her friends' love lives.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Angel throws an extravagant gender reveal party and is rattled when Nia makes an inappropriate joke. Jackie faces the consequences of meddling in Brittish's relationship with her ex-fiancé. Jen opens herself up to love and is surprised by what she finds.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: The women express concern for Angel's relationship, while cheating accusations shock the group. Jen is unsure if she wants to pursue things with her new crush after an awkward first kiss. Brandi starts a passion project in her late father's honor.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Jackie hosts a podcast to bring the women together as tensions push them apart. Brittish reflects on her past relationship with Lorenzo, while Angel feels the pressure of her baby's arrival. Brandi receives an urgent call regarding her health.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Duffey kicks off her birthday by inviting the ladies to her final performance in Vegas, but needs to reconcile with Angel. Brandi has to make a life-changing decision about her health. Brooke needs her kids approval before beginning her IVF journey.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: On the Vegas trip tensions boil over as Nia attempts to apologize to Angel, but the other ladies aren't convinced she is sincere. Duffey plays her last DJ set, but has second thoughts about ending her career for good.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Malaysia and Brandi try to mend their friendship, but Brandi is still hesitant. While producing her first track, Duffey disagrees with Iman over her decision to continue DJing. The ladies go head-to-head at a basketball game soiree.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Jackie advances into her acting career and lands a movie role while Angel struggles with her high-risk pregnancy. Jen hosts an event to launch her luxury hair line, but Malaysia brings a guest that threatens her relationship with the other women.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Jackie tries to uplift the ladies' spirits with a secret, surprise trip. Jen ponders the next step in her relationship with Jelani, and Brooke's plans for IVF take a turn. Meanwhile, Brittish reveals life changing news that may jeopardize her future.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Emotions flare amongst the group as Brooke tries to wrestle control of the trip away from Jackie. A "bewitching" activity catches Brandi off guard, while Brittish relies on the sisterhood for comfort as she struggles to cope with her recent arrest.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: As the Palm Springs trip concludes, Brooke and Jackie struggle to resolve their issues and Jen receives a surprise visitor – and a startling proposal. Malaysia makes a decision about her family's future. Angel enters the final days of her pregnancy.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: A fresh group of West Coast basketball wives, girlfriends, fiancées and exes deal with life in SoCal's hottest hub for gossip and game. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: After a rooftop altercation between Malaysia and Laura, Tanya finds herself the surprise recipient of the group's disdain. Imani tries to keep a secret about one of the girls close to the vest -- but can't resist calling her "worthless." Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Jackie prepares for her annual renewal of vows to Doug Christie, but will Draya make the cut for an invite? Jackie's bachelorette party nearly boils over when some surprise guests turn up the heat. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Hollister (Pat Conway) decides to go undercover to prevent editor Claibourne (Richard Eastham) from being murdered by a hitman who has been hired by a vengeful, local rancher whom the editor once helped to send to prison.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: As Clay watches the arrival of the stage from Tucson, a shooting down the street diverts his attention, and a $30,000 army payroll is stolen from a cavalry captain on the stage. Wounded and disarmed, he's forced into a battle to solve the crime.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: General amnesty follows the shooting of young Les Tanner by hired killers. Hollister (Pat Conway) cannot arrest the gunmen because of amnesty but he prevents a new flare-up of the feud by arresting the victim's brother who is out for revenge.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Young Mark Thompson shoots an old miner in the back, robs him, and flees. Sheriff Hollister trails him to his mother's home in Paradise. In order to expose the son's true character to his faithful mother, Hollister must put his own life on the line.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Against a background of sudden death and romance, Hollister comes to grips with beautiful young widow Sarah Curtice and her band of gunmen. Clay's efforts to combat their expanding crime wave provoke a dramatic showdown with Sarah's hired guns.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: When Chris Anderson confesses to Sheriff Hollister that Brewster Flat's Sheriff Binns and his deputy were in on a robbery, Sheriff Hollister 'cuts himself in' to the deal to force a showdown among the thieves and expose a double cross.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Convicted of murder, Sam Carver (Lee Van Cleef) escapes the custody of Deputy Marshal Bledsoe thanks to some rowdy conventioneers aboard the train. Jumping off, he heads to Tombstone Territory where he takes refuge at Hendrick's ranch.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Clay Hollister rides the stage to Laramie with a court order concerning a murder indictment against a man named Rowan. Clay finds that his fellow passengers include Rowan himself (under an alias) and a hired gun paid to kill the Sheriff.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is forced to face Duel Monsters creator, Maximillion Pegasus, in the mysterious Shadow Realm where all the monsters and magic are real. If Yugi loses, Pegasus claims Grandpa's soul as his prize!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi gives up one of his own Star Chips so Joey can board the boat bound for Duelist Kingdom and duel to save his sister's eyesight. Meanwhile, the cheat Weevil tries to cripple Yugi's deck by tossing his best cards overboard!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus announces that there are many strange secrets that will make his ultimate tournament unlike any they've ever had. Yugi must not only figure the rules out, but master them if he's to survive!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After Yugi defeats Weevil's first wave of Duel Monsters, he's shocked to discover that Weevil has one last trick up his sleeve; a ravenous Great Moth that grows in power with every turn!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey finds himself courageously accepting a challenge from veteran duelist, Mai. But when Mai begins to demonstrate an unnerving psychic ability, Joey has to figure out Mai's secret strategy before falling victim to it!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The fisherman duelist baits Yugi into a duel on his own sea playing field for a home-field advantage. Can Yugi adapt to these new settings to turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi is eliminated from the tournament, KaibaCorp's crooked Board of Directors will transfer control of the company from Kaiba to Pegasus! Kaiba's brother Mokuba challenges Yugi to a duel to protect his brother's company!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi must duel a magical doppelganger of Kaiba, created from the greed and power lust Yugi wiped from Kaiba's soul.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi defeats the Blue Eyes White Dragon, but there are two more waiting in the wings! Will the real Kaiba reach Yugi in time to help beat this impersonator?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey decides to battle Rex Raptor without his friends' help to prove that he is man enough to take care of Serenity on his own.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey duels valiantly, but Rex Raptor has unleashed his secret weapon: the Red-Eyes Black Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's classmate Bakura, possessed by his Millennium Ring's dark powers, traps Yugi and friends in a Shadow Game where they become the cards themselves!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus's hired duelist Panik cheats Mai of all her star chips, and Yugi vows to defeat him and win them back. But when Panik's Castle of Dark Illusions enshrouds his monsters in a black mist, how can Yugi defeat an enemy he cannot see?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Despite his astonishing disadvantage, Yugi boldly provokes Panik - "I'll finish you in three turns." Is Yugi bluffing, or does he have the advantage in this battle of wits?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba descends to the kingdom to face Pegasus. Has Kaiba changed since his battle with Yugi, or is he still the same merciless duelist? A battle between Kaiba's Blue Eyes White Dragon and Joey's Red Eyes Black Dragon holds the answers!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bandit Keith's gang kidnaps Joey to a secret cave with a graveyard playing field. As Yugi and friends search for him, Joey faces Bandit Keith's zombie monsters which become stronger as they return from the grave!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey's last-ditch effort, his lucky Time Wizard card, fails against Bandit Keith's zombie monsters. But as his lucky streak comes to an end, will his improving skills as a duelist and his love for his sister inspire him to victory?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Joey band together in a team battle against the Paradox Brothers with all the Star Chips and entrance to Pegasus's castle on the line!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Paradox Brothers summon the almighty Gate Guardian, a monster that reflects all attacks! Is Joey helping Yugi in this duel, or is his lack of experience sealing their fate for defeat?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Joey each unleash their strongest monster, the Summoned Skull, and the Red-Eyes Black Dragon, but their strength pales in comparison to the tremendous power of the Gate Guardian.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In order to earn the right to challenge Pegasus, Kaiba must first beat Yugi and take his Star Chips. The rematch between Yugi and Kaiba is about to begin!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba summons the Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon, the strongest monster in the game fused from three Blue-Eyes White Dragons! Yugi has lost all his powerful Duel Monsters, but a true duelist never gives up!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi begins spinning a strategy to put the Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon to rest, but he must decide whether to claim victory or spare Kaiba his life. Yugi's heart is split in two!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Having lost his star chips to Kaiba and his only opportunity to save Grandpa, Yugi is in a state of shock. Can Tea bring Yugi back to consciousness by defeating Mai for her extra star chips and teach Yugi the heart of the duelist?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends enter the castle to discover Kaiba ready to duel Pegasus with Mokuba's soul hanging in the balance! The power of the Millennium Eye gives Pegasus the ability to read other people's minds.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba is helpless against Pegasus's Toon World deck and mind-reading abilities. As the duel ends, Pegasus imprisons Kaiba's soul into a card, just like Grandpa and Mokuba!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi vows to overthrow Pegasus for the sake of his Grandpa. Tristan leads an exploration party to uncover Pegasus's secrets. While Joey sleeps, Bandit Keith steals from him the card that permits his entry in the final battle!

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam and Cat are tasked with getting a child to give up her ratty, old stuffed animal.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam gets a job as the assistant to rapper, Peezy B; Cat finds babysitting much more challenging without Sam around to help.

programme.title: Victorious: Beggin' On Your Knees
programme.desc: Beggin' On Your Knees: The Full Moon Jam is coming up. The cutest boy in school wants to perform a duet with Tori, but she finds out he has a reputation. Is Tori just having trust issues, or is this guy bad news?

programme.title: Victorious: Ice Cream for Ke$ha
programme.desc: Tori has to be Trina's assistant for a month. The only way Trina will call off the bet is if Tori wins a private Ke$ha concert. Tori's friends try to save Tori and hopefully score a Ke$ha concert!

programme.title: Victorious: Prom Wrecker
programme.desc: Tori rallies the gang into having prom at Hollywood Arts, but the event ruins Jade's art project, and now she's out for revenge. Can Tori throw a successful prom, with Jade aiming to bring the whole dance down?

programme.title: Victorious: Terror on Cupcake Street
programme.desc: The kids have to build a float fast. They only have a night to drive the float to the parade. When the float breaks down in a bad neighborhood, can the kids recover and save their chance to be on TV?

programme.title: Victorious: A Christmas Tori
programme.desc: The kids have to find the perfect Secret Santa gifts for each other, because whoever gives the worst gift has to go door-to-door yodeling with Sikowitz!

programme.title: Victorious: The Breakfast Bunch
programme.desc: Tori and the gang are forced to spend a Saturday in detention after a lunch trip gone wrong. They have the whole day to learn about each other, find food, and try not to earn more detention.

programme.title: Victorious: The Worst Couple
programme.desc: Jade and Beck help Sinjin with his new game show, "The Worst Couple," but it puts their relationship to the test. Meanwhile, Tori breaks her precious Pear Phone.

programme.title: Victorious: Andre's Horrible Girl
programme.desc: Tori notices some changes in her friend Andre, whose girlfriend seems to be overbearing and controlling. Meanwhile, Jade and Cat try to earn easy money dog-sitting in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Victorious: Car, Rain, & Fire
programme.desc: Cat's favorite actress dies and she talks Tori and Jade into driving to the actress' house to hold a vigil. Meanwhile, Trina directs a play starring herself, with Beck, Andre, and Robbie.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori & Jade's Play Date
programme.desc: Tori and Jade play a married couple putting their acting abilities and uneasy friendship to the test. Meanwhile, Cat & Robbie start a service where they deliver bad news in a friendly way.

programme.title: Victorious: The Gorilla Club
programme.desc: In an effort to take more risks as an actress, Tori goes to an underground spot called "The Gorilla Club." Meanwhile, Andre and Robbie lose a very interesting bet to Jade.

programme.title: Victorious: Driving Tori Crazy
programme.desc: When a movie shoot causes a traffic jam and interferes with Tori's morning commute, she turns to her friends for help. Meanwhile, Cat becomes addicted to an email coupon service.

programme.title: Victorious: How Trina Got In
programme.desc: Andre, Jade, Cat, and Beck trade urban legends about how Trina got accepted into Hollywood Arts. Meanwhile, Tori and Robbie are stuck at Nozu unable to pay their bill.

programme.title: Victorious: Crazy Ponnie
programme.desc: A strange new student named Ponnie befriends Tori but keeps disappearing around other people. Everyone worries Tori might be losing it, but Tori suspects that something more sinister is afoot.

programme.title: Victorious: Wanko's Warehouse
programme.desc: The gang's favorite megastore is having a massive sale. In order to avoid a huge line of customers, the kids hide out in the store until it closes so they can grab what they want before it's gone.

programme.title: Victorious: The Blonde Squad
programme.desc: While wearing a blonde wig and blue contacts for a film, Cat meets a boy and they quickly hit it off. When Cat realizes he thinks her costume is real, she worries he won't like the real her.

programme.title: Victorious: The Hambone King
programme.desc: After posting a hamboning (rhythmic thigh and knee-slapping) video online, Robbie is challenged for the title of Hambone King. When Robbie is beaten, Tori agrees to help Robbie avenge his defeat.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori Goes Platinum Pt. 1
programme.desc: Tori gets an opportunity to perform a song at a big awards program, but she's pushed into altering everything about herself in the process.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori Goes Platinum Pt. 2
programme.desc: Tori gets to sing at a big music awards show, but the producer wants to totally change her look and behavior. Tori agrees, but finds that she doesn't like her new image.

programme.title: Victorious: Opposite Date
programme.desc: After a group activity falls apart Tori and Beck decide to go on an "Opposite Date" where they do things that people would never do on a REAL date.

programme.title: Victorious: Cell Block
programme.desc: Sikowitz challenges the kids to go a week without using their phones, laptops, or other portable electronic devices. The kids accept and quickly realize it's not going to be as easy as they thought.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly jokes on the web show that she can beat up Shelby Marx, the best female fighter in the world, Shelby challenges Carly to an exhibition match.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Spencer freaks out when Carly starts dating a hot new guy with a bad reputation. And when Carly discovers that her new boyfriend has a shocking secret, she realizes that he may not the "bad boy" she thought he was.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam, Freddie, and Spencer go to Japan for the “iWeb Awards”. Kyoko and Yuki, their competition, have their cousins trap Spencer and Mrs. Benson, while they leave Carly, Sam, and Freddie in the middle of nowhere.
